channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Cruise Ship Linked to Hantavirus Outbreak Arrives in Spain’s Canary Islands for Disembarking - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Cruise Ship Linked to Hantavirus Outbreak Arrives in Spain’s Canary Islands for Disembarking  The New York Times

  4. Hantavirus: Current Situation  Centers for Disease Control and Prevention | CDC (.gov)
  5. WHO director arrives in Canary Islands to oversee hantavirus cruise evacuation: "This disease is not COVID"  CBS News

item.description:

item.title: Car bombing and shootout kills 14 Pakistani police officers - Reuters
item.description:
1. Car bombing and shootout kills 14 Pakistani police officers  Reuters

item.title: Indonesian rescuers find 1 body after volcano eruption as search continues for 2 more - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
item.description:
1. Indonesian rescuers find 1 body after volcano eruption as search continues for 2 more  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

  4. Indonesian rescuers retrieve body from Mount Dukono as search continues  The Guardian
  5. Tourists killed by volcano after defying hiking ban: 'Oh my God, they died!'  Yahoo
item.source: ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos

item.title: Fragile Iran ceasefire appears to hold as Iran warns the U.S. against attacks on its oil tankers and other ships - PBS

item.title: After Frederiksen Falls Short in Denmark, Right-Leaning Politician Is Asked to Form Government - The New York Times
item.description:

  4. Danish Prime Minister Fredriksen fails to form coalition, liberal takes over  Euractiv
  5. Danish deputy PM to lead coalition talks after Frederiksen’s effort fails  politico.eu

item.title: Long Overlooked, Caspian Sea Provides Strategic Trade Route for Iran - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Long Overlooked, Caspian Sea Provides Strategic Trade Route for Iran  The New York Times
  2. Russia said to be sending Iran drone parts via Caspian Sea, bypassing Hormuz blockade  The Times of Israel
  3. Caspian Sea becomes key trade route for Iran amid Hormuz disruption - NYT  ایران اینترنشنال
  4. Secret document reveals Russia’s plans to aid Iran  The Economist
  5. Russia and Iran use Caspian Sea trade route to aid Tehran’s drone program - NYT  The Jerusalem Post
